title: SoT Run Identity
description: Schema for run identity records that bind a convergence run to its contract, commits, report, and evidence artifacts. Each record uniquely identifies a single run and its policy outcome.

run_id.description: Unique identifier (UUID) for this convergence run.

contract_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the contract that governed this run.

canonical_commit.description: Git commit SHA of the canonical repository at run time.

derivative_commit.description: Git commit SHA of the derivative repository at run time.

report_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the findings report produced by this run.

evidence_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the evidence bundle produced by this run.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this run was executed.

policy_decision.description: Policy engine decision for this run.

finding_count.description: Aggregated finding counts grouped by severity.

by_severity.description: Finding counts grouped by severity level.
